Content Switcher

Source: Figma Content Switcher (2630:5644). Segmented control. Sizes XS / Small / Base / Large × Types Fill / Fill Minimal × States Default / Hover / Active / Hover-on-Active / Disabled. Click segments below to toggle the active state.

Sizes (Type = Fill, Count = 3)
Extra Small · 26
Small · 32
Base ✦ · 36
Large · 40
Types (Size = Base, Count = 4)
Fill
Fill Minimal
Counts (Type = Fill, Size = Base)
2
3
4
5
6
States (Size = Base, Type = Fill)
Default
Hover on Default
Active
Hover on Active
Disabled
Icon-only (32×32)
